title: Senior Financial Analyst - India Ratings - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - India Ratings - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
India Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Ratings:
India Ratings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings!
